1.includes: Skull, brain, hair, complexion, overall constitution and vitality.
1.icon_svg_inner: <circle cx='50' cy='50' fill='currentColor' fill-opacity='0.05' r='35' stroke-width='2'></circle><circle cx='50' cy='50' opacity='0.6' r='28' stroke-dasharray='4 2' stroke-width='1'></circle><path d='M35 45 Q50 35 65 45' stroke-width='2'></path><circle cx='50' cy='60' fill='currentColor' r='3'></circle><path d='M40 75 Q50 85 60 75' opacity='0.8' stroke-width='1.5'></path><path d='M50 15 V25 M85 50 H75 M50 85 V75 M15 50 H25' opacity='0.4' stroke-width='1'></path>

2.includes: The full ENT region — eyes (esp. right), tongue, teeth, mouth, nose, ears, throat, voice and speech.
2.icon_svg_inner: <path d='M30 20 L70 20 L75 60 Q75 80 50 85 Q25 80 25 60 Z' fill='currentColor' fill-opacity='0.1' stroke-width='2'></path><path d='M40 35 H60 M40 50 H60' opacity='0.5' stroke-width='1'></path><path d='M45 70 Q50 75 55 70' stroke-width='2'></path><rect fill='currentColor' fill-opacity='0.2' height='10' rx='2' stroke-width='1' width='16' x='42' y='85'></rect><path d='M45 88 H55 M45 92 H55' opacity='0.6' stroke-width='0.5'></path>

3.includes: Shoulders, arms, hands; right ear; upper chest and breath in some traditions.
3.icon_svg_inner: <path d='M10 40 H30 Q50 40 70 40 H90' stroke-width='2'></path><path d='M10 40 V80 M90 40 V80' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-width='2'></path><circle cx='20' cy='40' fill='currentColor' fill-opacity='0.2' r='6'></circle><circle cx='80' cy='40' fill='currentColor' fill-opacity='0.2' r='6'></circle><path d='M15 50 V70 M85 50 V70' stroke-dasharray='2 2' stroke-width='1'></path><path d='M40 35 Q50 30 60 35' opacity='0.5' stroke-width='1'></path>

4.includes: Heart region, lungs, breasts, ribcage and the chest cavity as a whole.
4.icon_svg_inner: <rect fill='currentColor' fill-opacity='0.05' height='45' rx='10' stroke-width='2' width='60' x='20' y='30'></rect><path d='M50 30 V75' opacity='0.6' stroke-dasharray='4 2' stroke-width='1'></path><circle cx='35' cy='52' fill='currentColor' fill-opacity='0.2' r='7' stroke-width='1.5'></circle><circle cx='65' cy='52' fill='currentColor' fill-opacity='0.2' r='7' stroke-width='1.5'></circle><circle cx='35' cy='52' fill='currentColor' r='2'></circle><circle cx='65' cy='52' fill='currentColor' r='2'></circle><path d='M25 40 Q50 35 75 40' opacity='0.4' stroke-width='1'></path>

5.includes: Heart, upper abdomen, liver; also manas (mind) and intellect.
5.icon_svg_inner: <path d='M50 20 L80 50 L50 80 L20 50 Z' fill='currentColor' fill-opacity='0.05' stroke-width='2'></path><circle cx='50' cy='45' fill='currentColor' fill-opacity='0.2' r='12' stroke-width='1.5'></circle><path d='M42 45 H58 M50 37 V53' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-width='2'></path><path d='M35 65 Q50 75 65 65' opacity='0.7' stroke-dasharray='3 2' stroke-width='1.5'></path><circle cx='50' cy='72' fill='currentColor' opacity='0.6' r='2'></circle>

6.includes: Stomach, intestines, kidneys (in many texts), waist and navel region.
6.icon_svg_inner: <path d='M30 30 H70 L65 75 H35 Z' fill='currentColor' fill-opacity='0.05' stroke-width='2'></path><path d='M30 45 H70 M32 60 H68' opacity='0.5' stroke-dasharray='4 4' stroke-width='1'></path><path d='M50 30 V75' opacity='0.4' stroke-width='1'></path><circle cx='50' cy='52' fill='currentColor' fill-opacity='0.2' r='5' stroke-width='1'></circle><rect fill='currentColor' fill-opacity='0.3' height='4' width='16' x='42' y='35'></rect><path d='M40 85 H60' opacity='0.6' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-width='1'></path>

7.includes: Lower abdomen, urinary bladder, kidneys (alternate tradition), uterus.
7.icon_svg_inner: <rect fill='currentColor' fill-opacity='0.1' height='25' rx='5' stroke-width='2' width='50' x='25' y='40'></rect><path d='M25 52 H75' opacity='0.6' stroke-dasharray='2 2' stroke-width='1'></path><path d='M50 40 V65' opacity='0.6' stroke-width='1'></path><circle cx='50' cy='52' fill='currentColor' fill-opacity='0.3' r='4' stroke-width='1'></circle><path d='M35 48 V56 M65 48 V56' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-width='1.5'></path><path d='M30 75 H70' opacity='0.3' stroke-width='0.5'></path>

8.includes: Generative and reproductive organs, anus, the excretory system.
